source: UNISA Programme in Forensic and Investigative Auditing
key_claim: UNISA public SLP pages present qualification code, duration, language, target group, registration, administrator and module content.
relevance_to_slp: Use this as the model for public-facing SLP concept notes.

source: World Economic Forum Future of Jobs Report 2025
key_claim: Technological change, AI, green transition and skills disruption are major forces shaping work to 2030.
relevance_to_slp: Justifies an AI + HRM portfolio focused on managers and workforce transformation.

source: International Labour Organization Generative AI and Jobs
key_claim: Generative AI affects job quality and task composition, with augmentation and automation effects varying by occupation and context.
relevance_to_slp: Supports course framing around task redesign and job quality rather than simple replacement narratives.

source: Brynjolfsson Li and Raymond Generative AI at Work
key_claim: A generative AI assistant improved customer support productivity on average, with stronger effects for less experienced workers.
relevance_to_slp: Supports practical LLM use, learning transfer and uneven productivity effects in SLP 01.

source: Tambe Cappelli and Yakubovich Artificial Intelligence in HRM
key_claim: AI in HRM faces challenges around complex HR phenomena, small datasets, accountability and employee reactions.
relevance_to_slp: Core source for teaching why HR AI requires careful design and governance.

key_claim: NIST AI RMF supports voluntary management of AI risks and trustworthiness across AI design, deployment and evaluation.
relevance_to_slp: Anchor framework for SLP 02 governance modules and risk artefacts.

key_claim: ISO/IEC 42001 specifies requirements for an organisational AI management system.
relevance_to_slp: Supports AI governance, policy, roles, monitoring and continual improvement content.

source: Information Regulator South Africa POPIA resources
key_claim: POPIA governs processing of personal information and includes requirements relevant to automated decision-making and security safeguards.
relevance_to_slp: South African legal anchor for HR data, employee privacy and AI decision support.

source: Köchling and Wehner Discriminated by an algorithm
key_claim: Algorithmic decision-making in recruitment and HR development raises discrimination and fairness concerns.
relevance_to_slp: Supports fairness, bias and audit modules in SLP 02.

source: Marler and Boudreau HR analytics evidence-based review
key_claim: HR analytics requires evidence-based reasoning, valid measures and organisational decision capability, not dashboards alone.
relevance_to_slp: Supports analytics literacy and decision-quality framing in SLP 03.

key_claim: OECD principles emphasise inclusive growth, human-centred values, transparency, robustness and accountability.
relevance_to_slp: Useful governance lens for analytics and decision support.

source: Shao et al Future of Work with AI Agents
key_claim: AI-agent adoption should distinguish automation from augmentation and preserve appropriate human agency.
relevance_to_slp: Supports human-in-the-loop workflow design and automation readiness in SLP 04.

source: Yuksel et al Agentic AI for Human Resources
key_claim: LLM-driven candidate assessment can combine multi-source HR data, rubrics and interpretable reports, but needs auditability.
relevance_to_slp: Useful emerging case for agentic recruitment workflow design.

source: UNESCO Guidance for generative AI in education and research
key_claim: Generative AI education should attend to ethics, human agency, age-appropriate and context-aware use.
relevance_to_slp: Supports responsible use expectations in learning activities and assessments.

source: Renwick Redman and Maguire Green HRM review
key_claim: Green HRM links HR practices with environmental management through recruitment, training, performance and employee involvement.
relevance_to_slp: Foundational Green HRM source for SLP 05.

source: Verdecchia Sallou and Cruz Systematic Review of Green AI
key_claim: Green AI research examines monitoring and reducing the environmental footprint of AI systems.
relevance_to_slp: Connects sustainable AI choices to HR-led digital work transformation.
